title: [security] broken Context::new() in OSCORE key handling
description: rust/lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs:386-451 (Context::new): references undefined variables (id_context_value, id_context, sender_state, restored, active, context_id, sender_seq). Incomplete struct init and key derivation (lines 414-436, 444-448). Affects master_secret/salt handling, key derivation via HKDF, ContextId, replay state for all OSCORE contexts. Critical for EDHOC-derived keys, nonce generation, replay protection. Touched in integration/oscore-recovery merge (42ba8eedd, one of last 20 commits). Also check edhoc.rs for related key export issues. Violates zeroize, constant-time, and RFC 8613 requirements.
close_reason: Fixed Context::new() struct initialization, key derivation, ContextId computation, added missing constructors (new_fresh/new_ephemeral/restore/from_sender_state) for tests/EDHOC, fixed export_oscore in edhoc.rs to use export_context; now compiles and passes relevant vector tests
